question: What is Meta's net zero commitment and what progress has been made in reducing operational emissions since 2017?
answers: Meta has maintained net zero emissions in its global operations since 2020, reducing operational emissions by 94% from a 2017 baseline. The company supported its data centers and offices with 100% renewable energy, and its renewable energy commitments have reduced GHG emissions by more than 12.3 million metric tons of CO2e since 2018.
Net zero in global operations since 2020, 94% reduction from 2017 baseline, 100% renewable energy, 12.3 million metric tons CO2e reduced since 2018.
